Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When a new Persona shares an Arcana with an established Social Link, the Persona will gain experience during fusion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The bonus experience gained from Social Links is called the {f 0 1 2}Social Link bonus{f 0 1 27}. The higher the rank of the Social Link, the greater the bonus.[n]{f 1 1}
